title: SLIMEasier
description: Lacking slime balls in Minecraft? Now you can get them easier!
body:
SlimEASIER!

Ever had trouble with finding Slime Balls, wanted to make them without finding those elusive Slimes, or simply have more ways to get it? With Slimeasier, you can have all of that! Here's how it works:


### MAIN GOALS:
  1. Break Leaves: When you're chopping down trees, keep an eye out for Sticky Leaves. They have a small chance to drop when you break leaves.
  2. Cook 'em Up: Toss those Sticky Leaves onto a campfire to turn them into Slime Scraps.
  3. Craft Away: Gather x4 Slime Scraps and you've got yourself a Slime Ball!

CONFIG:

This mod comes with a "Slimeasier" config file where you can adjust the drop rates to your liking. Simple, fun, and integrates smoothly into your Minecraft adventures!

And that's all!

If you wish to use this in a modpack, feel free to do so!
